headline: How proposed Caesars, MGM deals could impact casino workers
summary: Two proposed multibillion-dollar gaming deals announced less than a week apart would put 17 Las Vegas Strip casino resorts under new ownership, prompting questions about whether the transactions will affect tens of thousands of employees who work for Caesars Entertainment Inc. and MGM Resorts International in Southern Nevada. Combined, Caesars and MGM employ approximately 70,000 workers in Las ...
